reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, y nos salvaron la vida prácticamente los que trabajan de noche, que nos ayudaron a cambiar la rueda ya que pasar por la África santiagueña, donde las rutas están muy mal estado y la gente en moto te quiere robar, terminas hecho bolsa y encima con la rueda pinchada y todos cagados por los motochorros que te siguen a la madrugada por la ruta. Recomiendo este ACA 👍🏼

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and the night shift workers practically saved our lives by helping us change the tire. Driving through the Santiago del Estero region, where the roads are in terrible condition and motorcyclists try to rob you, you end up exhausted, with a flat tire, and everyone worried about the thieves following you in the early hours. I highly recommend this ACA (Association of Motorcyclists of Santiago del Estero). 👍🏼
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOE9fdXh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No puede ser que el shop no esté abierto a la siesta y más siendo temporada. Lamentable no poder comprar ni un agua. YPF debería exigirle y estandarizar horarios

(Translated by Google)
It's unacceptable that the shop isn't open during siesta, especially during peak season. It's a shame not even being able to buy water. YPF should require them to standardize their opening hours.
